name: What do I do right after an on-the-job accident in Ogden?
description: Get medical help, report to boss in writing, document everything immediately.[2]

mainEntity.name: What do I do right after an on-the-job accident in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get medical help, report to boss in writing, document everything immediately.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Seek medical attention immediately, report to employer in writing, and notify workers comp insurer within required time.[2] Context: Prompt action preserves claims; Utah requires reporting injuries arising from employment.[2][4] Key factors: Get treated even minor; document scene/photos; avoid signing anything without review. Practical guidance: Use incident report form; keep all records; don't discuss fault with coworkers. Time-sensitive to avoid denial. Early legal consult protects rights.
